def positive_flask_app_config_read_per_request():
    rule_id = "flask_app_config_read_per_request"
    family = "framework"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flask views repeatedly read app.config on request paths instead of consuming bootstrapped settings."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
